allow: Bash(cmd /c "for /f \\"tokens=5\\" %a in \('netstat -aon 2^>nul ^| findstr :5000 ^| findstr LISTENING'\) do taskkill /F /PID %a")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen | Select-Object OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)" }')
